name: Issues
description: Cabinet-native issue tracker. Replaces Linear/Jira — labels, priority, state, assignee, due date, watchers, and comments are built in. Semantic search works across titles and bodies. Cross-Space references via Linear-style identifiers.

fields.name: assignee
fields.description: Officer abbreviation (cos, cto, cpo, cro, coo) or 'captain' for founder-action items

fields.name: watchers
fields.description: Officers notified on state changes and new comments

fields.name: blocked_by
fields.description: Other Issues records this depends on

fields.name: captain_decision
fields.description: Set true when Captain makes a decision that affects this issue (mirrors the gold captain-decision label in Linear)

fields.name: founder_action
fields.description: Requires Captain's direct action (credentials, manual config, external tool access)

fields.name: linear_id
fields.description: Original Linear identifier (e.g. SEN-547) if imported from Linear. Used for idempotent migration.
